title: Representative Eval Sets, Deterministic Oracles, Baselines, and Versions · Language Clinic: Changed Adversarial Cases
summary: The team tests five hand-picked happy prompts, changes them after failures, has no task distribution or deterministic checks, and compares only final prose. Predict authority, model and API behavior, state, tool effects, budgets, privacy, safety, accessibility, failure, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the changed adversarial cases increment in versioned representative agent evaluation corpus. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theor…
objectives: Create changed-input, changed-policy, tool-fault, injection, memory-poisoning, approval, cancellation, and resource-exhaustion cases without leaking answers.
Define exact schema, state, tool, argument, authorization, effect, citation, budget, stop, and recovery assertions wherever outcomes are deterministic.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-ai-agent-python cumulative safe evaluated AI agent portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python interaction, tool, policy, state, memory,
evaluation, telemetry, and recovery models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only.
Provider APIs, Gemini models, native google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic, HTTP, credentials,
host files, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, cost, privacy review,
and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentPolicy:
    stakeholder_task_id: str
    allowed_tool_names: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_steps: int = 12
    maximum_tool_calls: int = 8
    approval_required_for_writes: bool = True


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentEvidence:
    revision: str
    model_config_digest: str
    policy_digest: str
    evaluation_digest: str
    recovery_drill_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Safe evaluated Python AI agent portfolio ready"

content.code:
# Evidence: agentpy-worked-agentpy-eval-dataset-oracles-3
# Competency: agentpy-worked-agentpy-eval-dataset-oracles-3.
# Case 5798: a keyboard and screen-reader interaction review.
# Operating constraint: every external effect requires explicit least-authority policy.
# Changed case: change one tool call, argument, authority, result, or failure and preserve correlation.
def worked_agentpy_eval_dataset_oracles_3(eval_cases: int = 72, normal_cases: int = 30, boundary_cases: int = 18, adversarial_cases: int = 18, accessibility_cases: int = 6) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked3 = "worked3-3dekrow-5798"
    assert evidence_variant_worked3
    evidence_axes_worked3 = (
        "authorityworked3",
        "interaction5798",
        "tool3dekrow",
        "stateworked35798",
        "evaluation5798worked3",
        "recovery3dekrow5798",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked3)) == 6
    if eval_cases < 40:
        return False, eval_cases, "eval-depth"
    if normal_cases + boundary_cases + adversarial_cases + accessibility_cases != eval_cases:
        return False, normal_cases, "eval-reconciliation"
    if boundary_cases < 8 or adversarial_cases < 8:
        return False, adversarial_cases, "eval-risk-coverage"
    if accessibility_cases < 4:
        return False, accessibility_cases, "eval-accessibility"
    assert normal_cases + boundary_cases + adversarial_cases + accessibility_cases == eval_cases
    return True, eval_cases, "representative-agent-evals"

Browser code must not contact provider APIs, invoke Gemini models, import or claim native google-genai, google-adk, or Pydantic behavior, open sockets, read or write host files, use credentials, execute generated code, launch browsers, reach databases or telemetry backends, or claim live privacy, load, safety, cost, or production behavior; verify those boundaries later with Python 3.14.6, google-genai 2.11.0, google-adk 2.4.0, Pydantic 2.13.4, fixed provider fixtures, fake transports, controlled local services, disposable cloud projects, representative eval sets, accessibility, privacy and security review, load, canary, rollback, recovery, and release gates.

content.code:
# Evidence: agentpy-changed-adversarial-cases-abh1wm
# Competency: agentpy-changed-adversarial-cases.
# Case 7393: a multilingual case-routing evaluation.
# Operating constraint: sensitive actions require a trustworthy user approval bound to exact arguments.
# Changed case: introduce a sensitive action, poisoned memory, leaking log, or computer-use request and deny or pause it.
def evidence_agentpy_changed_adversarial_cases_abh1wm(eval_cases: int = 72, normal_cases: int = 30, boundary_cases: int = 18, adversarial_cases: int = 18, accessibility_cases: int = 6) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_abh1wm = "abh1wm-mw1hba-7393"
    assert evidence_variant_abh1wm
    evidence_axes_abh1wm = (
        "authorityabh1wm",
        "interaction7393",
        "toolmw1hba",
        "stateabh1wm7393",
        "evaluation7393abh1wm",
        "recoverymw1hba7393",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_abh1wm)) == 6
    if eval_cases < 40:
        return False, eval_cases, "eval-depth"
    if normal_cases + boundary_cases + adversarial_cases + accessibility_cases != eval_cases:
        return False, normal_cases, "eval-reconciliation"
    if boundary_cases < 8 or adversarial_cases < 8:
        return False, adversarial_cases, "eval-risk-coverage"
    if accessibility_cases < 4:
        return False, accessibility_cases, "eval-accessibility"
    assert normal_cases + boundary_cases + adversarial_cases + accessibility_cases == eval_cases
    return True, eval_cases, "representative-agent-evals"
